<!--
Thanks for sending a patch. Keep this short; delete sections that do not apply.
See CONTRIBUTING.md for what lands easily and what needs an issue first.
-->

## What and why

<!-- One or two sentences on the user-visible change and the problem it solves. -->

Closes #

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature / integration
- [ ] Docs
- [ ] Refactor with no behavior change
- [ ] Config-schema or WebSocket-format change (opened an issue first per CONTRIBUTING.md)

## Checklist

- [ ] `./scripts/verify` passes locally (ruff, pytest, frontend lint + test + build)
- [ ] Added or updated tests covering the change
- [ ] Updated the `Unreleased` section of `CHANGELOG.md` for any user-visible effect
- [ ] No real hostnames, device IPs, account names, tokens, or unredacted absolute paths in code, config examples, tests, or this PR (the content-guard pre-push hook will flag them)
- [ ] Conventional commit messages, no AI co-authorship trailers
